title: Amtech G4400 38mm (1.5") No bristle loss angled brush with soft handle
features: GET INTO CORNERS: This angled 38mm (1.5") paint brush is perfect for getting onto corners
NO BRISTLE LOSS: The filament length and no bristle loss design ensures a smooth finish and excellent paint pickup, coverage and offload
VERSATILE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: The brush has a comfortable, soft handle and is suitable for use with emulsion, varnish and oil-based paints
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
